body: [status] Pushed a56af1d to main — #47 all weapon icons + rope are PixelLab PNGs; #48 day/night, night vista2 (aurora), lake shimmer, biome floor tints (server/greenhouse/flood), perched crow sprite, ambient scatter. Bake now multi-row packs under WebGL 16384. Issues #47/#48/#50 commented on GH. Pages deploys ~40s — hard refresh. Leftover: portraits, structural SVGs, biome geometry polish, #50 playtest.
